hooks.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" == *"rm -rf"* ]]; then echo 'BLOCKED: rm -rf is dangerous. Use rm with specific paths.' && exit 2; fi
if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" == *"git push --force"* ]] || [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" == *"git push -f"* ]]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Force push requires explicit approval.' && exit 2; fi
if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" =~ \.py$ ]]; then timeout 5 ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
